prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为33632、37281、37031、42918、50918名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约13887名，2025年基准约50918名；本省物理类计划2021-2022年均为76人，2023年86人，2024年92人，2025年118人，2026年122人，较2025年小幅扩招约3.4%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争缓 解作用不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第135名，近年排名稳中有升（2021年165名→2026年135名），学校综合实力持续提升。\ n2022年声誉评价偏负面（宿舍改造问题），但2023-2026年无显著负面舆情；抖音热度排名第58位，评价为"较热"，综合热度约55万，在同类211中关注度中等；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上学科，学科实力以农学、医学、师范为特色，整体学科竞争力在211院校中处于中后段。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 石河子大学位于新疆，距江西省较远，地域偏好对江西考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用，但211身份仍具吸引 力；计算机类、电气工程、临床医学等社会高热专业在石河子大学均有招生，对考生有一定吸引力；本省2026年普通高考总人数474900人，较2025年472480人微增约0.5%，竞 争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+3.4%）、本省考生总数微增、抖音热度中等偏热等因素，在2025年基准50918名基础上预计位次继续后 移；预测最低位次约52154名，区间51654-52654名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 33632, 37281, 37031, 42918, and 50918 respectively, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 13887 positions in the last 3 years, and a baseline of approximately 50918 in 2025; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 76 in both 2021 and 2022, 86 in 2023, 92 in 2024, 118 in 2025, and 122 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 3.4% compared to 2025, with limited impact on easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 135th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a steady upward trend in recent years (from 165th in 2021 to 135th in 2026), indicating continuously improving comprehensive strength.\ nIn 2022, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (dormitory renovation issue), but from 2023 to 2026, there were no significant negative public opinions; ranked 58th in Douyin heat, rated as "relatively hot", with a comprehensive heat of about 550,000, showing moderate attention among similar 211 universities; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, no disciplines were rated A- or above, with discipline strengths characterized by agriculture, medicine, and teacher training, and overall discipline competitiveness in the middle to lower segment among 211 institutions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Jiangxi Province, and regional preference has a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Jiangxi candidates to apply, but the 211 identity still attracts; high-demand majors in society such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine are all offered at Shihezi University, attracting candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in the province is 474,900, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 472,480 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+3.4%), the slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, and the moderately hot Douyin heat, the ranking is expected to continue to shift backward based on the 2025 baseline of 50918; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 52154, with a range of 51654-52654.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Cyberspace Security).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Food Science and Engineering
- Environmental Engineering
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Marketing)
- Emergency Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 51654-52654, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, moderately aim for Tier 1 majors, and safely use Tier 3 majors as a backup; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 51654), you can focus on impacting popular Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 52654), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 7028, 8321, 7574, 6627, and 6948 respectively, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2024, it clearly moved forward to 6627, then slightly moved back to 6948 in 2025, with a baseline of approximately 6948 for 2025. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 14 students in 2021-2022, 12 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 10 in 2025, and 10 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no change in the plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 135th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a continuous rise in recent years and steadily improving comprehensive strength. In 2022, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to dormitory renovation issues), but there has been no significant negative public opinion in recent years. Douyin popularity ranks 58th, rated as 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, indicating moderate attention among similar 211 universities. No significant record of admission gaps was observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no A- or above disciplines. Liberal arts majors mainly include traditional ones such as Chinese Language and Literature, Law, and History, with average disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular, attracting some liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province is 474,900, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 472,480 in 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Jiangxi Province, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Jiangxi candidates to apply, but its 211 status still holds some appeal for liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in the number of provincial candidates, and moderate to high Douyin popularity, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 6948. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7000, with a range of 6500-7500.
